notes: Rebuilt onboarding start screen as a thin operational form using shared onboarding client/contracts only.
POST body remains contract-safe at top-level: tenant_id, tenant_type, signup_event_id, metadata.

Collected only required fields plus allowed metadata passthrough keys (business_name, contact_name, assistant_name_preference, user_name_preference, preferred_channel, backup_channel, owner_user_id, proposed_slug).
Implemented loading, typed success/error rendering, and status route hint link after successful start.
